questions.question: On the pattern of which among the following countries, the parliamentary system was established in India by the Constitution of India?
questions.explanation: Indian parliamentary system is based upon the Parliamentary system in England.

questions.question: The Indian Constitution has adopted Parliamentary System of Constitution from which among the following countries?
questions.explanation: Indian Constitution has adopted Parliamentary System of Constitution from UK.

questions.question: Which of the following statements is correct regarding parliamentary system in India?

options.label: A
options.text: Executive is responsible to the Legislature

options.label: B
options.text: Legislature is responsible to the Executive

options.label: C
options.text: Executive is responsible to the people

options.label: D
options.text: Executive is responsible to the judicary

answer.label: A
answer.text: Executive is responsible to the Legislature

questions.explanation: The Constitution of India states that the in a parliamentary system, the Executive branch of the State (Council of Ministers) shall be collectively responsible to the Legislature (House of the People).

questions.question: Executive is responsible to which among the following in parliamentary system?
questions.explanation: A parliamentary system or parliamentary democracy is a system of democratic governance of a state where the executive is responsible to the legislature.

questions.question: Which among the following is an essential feature of a Unitary Government ?
questions.explanation: Written Constitution, Independence of Judiciary, Double Citizenship, Dual Polity, Division of Powers, Supremacy of the Constitution are all federal features.
